# requirements.txt - Generated by Copilot
# Core dependencies for Azure TTS audio pipeline with Typer CLI and accessibility best practices

# CLI and argument parsing
click>=8.1.3
# Typer is built on Click and provides modern CLI with type hints
typer[all]>=0.9.0

# Audio processing
pydub>=0.25.1
mutagen>=1.47.0

# Azure SDKs
azure-cognitiveservices-speech>=1.34.1
requests>=2.31.0

# Accessibility and testing
pa11y>=6.0.0  # For accessibility validation (optional, node.js required)
pytest>=7.4.0  # For unit testing

# Optional: For docx input support
python-docx>=0.8.11

# Optional: For colorized terminal output (accessibility)
colorama>=0.4.6

# For type hints and linting
mypy>=1.8.0

# For compatibility with pathlib on older Python
pathlib2; python_version<'3.4'

# For screen reader testing (manual, not a Python package)
# See project README for more info
